company: New York State Electric & Gas Corporation and Rochester Gas and Electric Corporation
company_raw: New York State Electric & Gas Corporation and Rochester Gas and Electric Corporation
source_note: NorthStar Consulting Group's independent Comprehensive Management and Operations Audit of New York State Electric & Gas Corporation (NYSEG) and Rochester Gas and Electric Corporation (RG&E) — the Avangrid-owned utilities — under PSL §66(19), Case 23-M-0103 (439 pp). Report dated February 4, 2025; publicly released by PSC Order Releasing Audit Report on May 15, 2025. The auditor makes 128 recommendations; key findings include that Avangrid's complex corporate structure (13 affiliates) obscures whether allocated charges follow cost causation, and that NYSEG failed enforceable reliability standards for six consecutive years.
